headline: Analyzing WCN's Growth Drivers & Market Expansion Amid Liquidity Risks
summary: Waste Connections beat Q1'26 earnings estimates as revenues rise, fueled by acquisitions and pricing moves. Yet, a low current ratio flags liquidity strain.
